title: B1 Listening - Part 1 - Test 29
instructions: For each question, listen to the recording and choose the correct answer: A, B or C.

items.context: You hear two friends arranging to meet before a trip.
items.audio_script: Girl: Are we still meeting outside the cinema for meeting for the school trip? I wrote it down yesterday, but I have not checked today's message. || Boy: That was the original plan, but the coach cannot stop near the cinema today. [1]We need to meet at the bus station entrance instead[/1].. || Girl: Good thing I asked. I nearly went to the old place and waited there. What about the school gate? || Boy: No, nobody will be waiting there. I will arrive a few minutes early and message you if anything changes again before we start.
items.question: Where should they meet?
items.explanation: They should meet at the bus station entrance.

items.context: You hear two students preparing for a museum visit.
items.audio_script: Boy: Have you packed for the museum visit on Monday yet? I put a packed lunch in my bag because I thought that was what we needed. || Girl: That was mentioned earlier, but lunch is included and pens are not allowed in the exhibition room. [2]Everyone needs to bring a pencil for the worksheet[/2].. || Boy: I am glad I checked. I nearly left my bag by the door. Do I need a pen as well? || Girl: No, that is not necessary. Put the new item in tonight and check the message once more before you leave in the morning.
items.question: What should the student bring?
items.explanation: The student should bring a pencil.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about tonight.
items.audio_script: Woman: Are we still going to watch a football match this weekend? I told my family I would be out this afternoon. || Man: That was our first plan, but the match has been cancelled and our neighbour has spare festival tickets. We also thought about whether to go to the theatre. || Woman: So what have we decided? I need to tell my brother soon. || Man: [3]We are going to the music festival instead[/3].. I will check the times online tonight and send you a message before we meet. || Woman: Great. That sounds easier than the other ideas.
items.question: What are they going to do tonight?
items.explanation: They decide to attend a music festival.

items.context: You hear two people talking about a bus to the airport.
items.audio_script: Man: I need to check the time for the airport bus. I wrote down twenty past six, but I am not sure it is correct. || Woman: It changed this morning because it is following the weekend timetable tomorrow. [4]The airport bus leaves at twenty to seven[/4]., and we should arrive ten minutes earlier. || Man: I am glad I asked. I would have arrived at the wrong time and waited there. || Woman: I will send you a reminder later. Bring everything you need, because there may not be time to go home first.
items.question: What time does the bus leave?
items.explanation: The airport bus leaves at twenty to seven.

items.context: You hear two friends talking about a laptop.
items.audio_script: Girl: How are you getting on with your laptop? I heard there was a problem with it yesterday. || Boy: I first thought the screen was too dark, and my brother wondered whether the battery was empty. But someone checked it carefully this morning. [5]Several keys on the keyboard have stopped working[/5].. || Girl: Can it be repaired soon? You said you needed it to finish my application this weekend. || Boy: Yes, probably. Now we know what is wrong, it should be ready tomorrow. That is a relief, because I cannot manage without it.
items.question: What is wrong with the laptop?
items.explanation: Several keys on the laptop keyboard do not work.

items.context: You hear two friends arranging a journey to the airport.
items.audio_script: Boy: How are you getting to the airport on Friday? I thought you were planning to travel by coach. || Girl: I was, but the coach is full and a taxi costs too much. I also considered going by taxi. [6]I will take the train instead[/6].. || Boy: That sounds sensible. What time do you expect to arrive there? || Girl: Just before eleven, if everything is on time. I checked the journey online, so I will message you when I leave home. || Boy: Good. I will wait near the entrance so you can find me easily.
items.question: How will the speaker get to the airport?
items.explanation: The speaker will take the train.

items.context: You hear two people choosing a gift for a teacher.
items.audio_script: Woman: Did you choose anything for our teacher's leaving present? You were thinking about some flowers when we spoke yesterday. || Man: I looked at that, and nearly chose a box of chocolates, but it will last longer than flowers and she does not eat chocolate. [7]We bought a small plant in the end[/7].. || Woman: That sounds like a better choice. It is useful as well as thoughtful, so I am sure they will like it. || Man: I hope so. I kept the receipt just in case, and I will wrap it carefully this evening after dinner.
items.question: What did they buy?
